AssertionFamily.description: Instance-defined family used to group reviewer assertions; values are not schema enums.
AssertionFamily.title: AssertionFamily

EvidenceClaim.description: A claim with explicit applicability and provenance, never an implicit correctness oracle.
EvidenceClaim.title: EvidenceClaim

GovernanceRecord.description: Operational governance metadata kept separate from reviewer assertions.
GovernanceRecord.title: GovernanceRecord

LifecycleState.description: Instance-defined lifecycle/status record; status names remain data.
LifecycleState.title: LifecycleState

OntologyAssertion.description: A reviewer-authored assertion, distinct from operational scheduling constraints.
OntologyAssertion.title: OntologyAssertion

RelationAssertion.description: Raw declarative relation assertion record projected into runtime vocabulary.
RelationAssertion.title: RelationAssertion

RelationType.description: Declarative metadata describing how an assertion relation behaves.

directionality.description: Declarative directionality token supplied by instance data.

RelationType.title: RelationType

RuntimePolicyCatalog.description: Typed executable policy contract consumed by planner runtime.
RuntimePolicyCatalog.title: RuntimePolicyCatalog
